title: Global Response to Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
subtitle: Health authorities work to track passengers and manage a rare virus outbreak at sea

summary.en: A cruise ship named the MV Hondius is currently traveling to Spain after a hantavirus outbreak occurred on board. Three people have died, and health officials across the world are working to track passengers who left the ship earlier. The virus usually spreads through contact with rodents, though rare human-to-human transmission is possible. Experts say the risk to the general public remains very low. Several countries are now organizing flights to bring their citizens home safely.
summary.zh: 一艘名為「宏迪斯號」的郵輪在船上爆發漢他病毒疫情後，目前正前往西班牙。該疫情已造成三人死亡，全球衛生官員正努力追蹤先前已下船的乘客。此病毒通常透過接觸齧齒動物傳播，儘管罕見的人傳人現象是有可能的。專家表示，對一般大眾的風險仍然極低。目前多國正安排航班，以確保其公民能安全返家。

paragraphs.en: A luxury cruise ship is currently traveling to the Canary Islands in Spain following a serious health emergency. The ship, known as the MV Hondius, has been dealing with an outbreak of hantavirus, a rare disease that has already caused three deaths. According to BBC News, the ship began its journey in Argentina on April 1. By the time the danger was identified, many passengers had already left the vessel at different stops, leading to a worldwide effort to find and monitor these individuals.
paragraphs.zh: 一艘豪華郵輪目前正前往西班牙的加納利群島，此前船上發生了嚴重的健康緊急狀況。這艘名為「宏迪斯號」（MV Hondius）的郵輪爆發了漢他病毒疫情，這是一種罕見的疾病，目前已造成三人死亡。根據英國廣播公司新聞網（BBC News）報導，該船於四月一日從阿根廷啟程。當危險被確認時，許多乘客已在不同的停靠站下船，這導致全球各地正展開搜尋並監控這些人員的行動。

paragraphs.en: Health authorities are working hard to track down people who were on the ship. BBC News reports that more than 150 passengers and crew members from 28 countries were initially on board. On April 24, dozens of guests left the ship at the island of St. Helena. Because the outbreak was not confirmed until May 2, these passengers traveled home without knowing they might have been exposed to the virus. Ars Technica explains that officials are now monitoring these former passengers to ensure they do not become ill. This process is complex because the virus has an incubation period—the time between catching a disease and showing symptoms—that can last up to six weeks.
paragraphs.zh: 衛生當局正全力追蹤船上的相關人員。BBC新聞報導指出，船上最初載有來自二十八個國家的超過一百五十名乘客與船員。四月二十四日，數十名旅客在聖赫勒拿島下船。由於直到五月二日才確認疫情爆發，這些乘客在不知情的情況下返家，可能已暴露於病毒風險中。科技新聞網站「Ars Technica」解釋，官員們目前正監控這些前乘客，以確保他們不會發病。此過程相當複雜，因為該病毒有潛伏期——即從感染到出現症狀的時間——最長可達六週。

paragraphs.en: Hantavirus is typically spread when people breathe in air that contains tiny particles from the urine, droppings, or saliva of infected rodents. However, the specific type of virus found on the ship, the Andes strain, can sometimes spread between people. According to the BBC News, this is the first time such transmission has been reported on a boat. Despite this, experts are trying to calm public fears. The World Health Organization has stated that the risk to the general public is very low. They noted that this situation is not like the COVID-19 pandemic, as the virus requires close, intimate contact to spread.
paragraphs.zh: 漢他病毒通常是透過吸入含有受感染齧齒動物尿液、糞便或唾液微粒的空氣而傳播。然而，在船上發現的特定病毒類型「安地斯病毒株」，有時可在人與人之間傳播。根據BBC新聞報導，這是首次有紀錄顯示此類病毒在船上發生人傳人現象。儘管如此，專家們仍試圖平息大眾的恐懼。世界衛生組織（WHO）表示，對一般大眾的風險極低。他們指出，此情況與新冠肺炎疫情不同，因為該病毒需要密切且親密的接觸才會傳播。

paragraphs.en: As the MV Hondius approaches the Canary Islands, governments are preparing to help their citizens. STAT News reports that both the United States and the United Kingdom have agreed to send planes to bring their people home. Once the ship arrives in Tenerife, passengers will be moved to a special area that is completely isolated from the public. Spanish officials have said that the weather may make the evacuation difficult, so they have a short window of time on Sunday to move everyone safely. If they miss this chance, the ship might have to wait longer.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著宏迪斯號接近加納利群島，各國政府正準備協助其公民。醫療新聞網站「STAT News」報導，美國與英國皆已同意派遣飛機將國民接回。郵輪抵達特內里費島後，乘客將被移至與公眾完全隔離的特別區域。西班牙官員表示，天氣狀況可能會增加撤離難度，因此他們僅有週日的一小段時間窗口能安全轉移所有人。若錯過此機會，郵輪可能必須等待更久。

paragraphs.en: There is still some confusion about how the outbreak started. Deutsche Welle (DW) Top reports that Argentine health officials believe it is very unlikely that the passengers were infected in Argentina. They suggest that the virus might have been picked up elsewhere during the long voyage. While the cruise operator, Oceanwide Expeditions, stated that no one currently on the ship is showing symptoms, the situation remains a serious concern for the passengers and their families.
paragraphs.zh: 關於疫情如何開始，目前仍存在一些混亂。德國之聲（DW）報導，阿根廷衛生官員認為乘客在阿根廷感染的可能性極低。他們推測病毒可能是在漫長的航程中於其他地方感染的。雖然郵輪營運商「海洋廣闊探險公司」（Oceanwide Expeditions）聲稱目前船上無人出現症狀，但此情況對乘客及其家屬而言，仍是嚴重的隱憂。

paragraphs.en: For those who have already returned home, the experience has been stressful. Some passengers are choosing to stay in their homes to protect others, even if they feel healthy. In the United Kingdom, for example, some people are self-isolating voluntarily. Meanwhile, medical experts are providing support to those who need it, including those on remote islands. While one expert told BBC News that the initial response to the outbreak was uncoordinated, international cooperation has since improved. As the world watches the arrival of the MV Hondius, the main goal remains the safety of the passengers and the prevention of any further spread of the virus.
paragraphs.zh: 對於已經返家的乘客來說，這段經歷令人備感壓力。部分乘客選擇待在家中以保護他人，即便他們自覺健康。例如在英國，有些人正自願進行居家隔離。同時，醫學專家正為有需要的人提供支援，包括身處偏遠島嶼的乘客。雖然有一位專家向BBC新聞表示，疫情爆發初期的應對缺乏協調，但國際間的合作隨後已有所改善。隨著全球關注宏迪斯號的抵達，主要目標仍是確保乘客安全，並防止病毒進一步擴散。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To find someone or something after a difficult or long search.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 追蹤到、搜尋到（某人或某物）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於偵探或搜尋情境，這裡指衛生單位尋找散落在各地的乘客。文中：Health authorities are working hard to track down people who were on the ship.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A short period of time when something can be done.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（窗戶），這裡指特定時間內的行動機會。文中：so they have a short window of time on Sunday to move everyone safely.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To catch or contract an illness or infection.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「撿起」或「接人」，這裡指感染病毒。文中：They suggest that the virus might have been picked up elsewhere during the long voyage.

sources.name: STAT News
sources.title: Spain readies for evacuations as a hantavirus-hit cruise ship heads for the Canary Islands

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Hantavirus: US plans evacuation flight for American cruise passengers

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: The unprecedented and deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak, explained

quiz.question: What is the primary reason that tracking the passengers who left the ship at St. Helena is considered a difficult task?

options.A: The passengers refused to provide their contact information to the cruise operator.
options.B: The virus has a long incubation period, meaning passengers could be infected without showing symptoms for weeks.
options.C: The passengers were from 28 different countries, making international coordination impossible.
options.D: The health authorities did not realize the ship had an outbreak until it reached the Canary Islands.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，由於該病毒有長達六週的潛伏期（incubation period），這使得追蹤工作變得複雜，因為乘客在離開時可能已經感染但尚未發病。選項 A 文章未提及；選項 C 雖然提到有 28 個國家，但文章指出國際合作已有所改善，並非無法進行；選項 D 錯誤，因為疫情是在 5 月 2 日確認的，而非抵達加那利群島時才發現。

quiz.question: Based on the article, what can be inferred about the risk of a global hantavirus pandemic resulting from this cruise ship?

options.A: It is highly probable because the virus can spread through the air in public spaces.
options.B: It is likely to happen because the ship visited many different countries during its voyage.
options.C: It is unlikely because the virus requires close contact and is not easily transmitted between humans.
options.D: It is impossible to determine because the origin of the outbreak remains a mystery.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第三段，世界衛生組織（WHO）明確指出此情況與 COVID-19 不同，因為該病毒需要密切接觸才能傳播，且專家認為對大眾的風險極低。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章指出該病毒通常透過囓齒動物排泄物傳播，人傳人並不常見；選項 B 屬於過度推論；選項 D 雖然提到起源不明，但並非決定疫情是否會全球大流行的關鍵因素。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'window' mean in the phrase 'a short window of time'?

options.A: A glass opening in a wall used for looking outside.
options.B: A specific, limited opportunity to complete a task.
options.C: A computer interface that displays information.
options.D: A period of rest during a long journey.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在文中 'a short window of time' 指的是一個「特定的短暫時機」或「黃金時間窗口」，用來執行撤離任務。選項 A 是字面意思，但在文中不適用；選項 C 與電腦科技相關，與文意不符；選項 D 雖然提到了時間長度，但並非指休息時間，而是指執行任務的有效期限。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main focus of the article?

options.A: The history of hantavirus outbreaks on luxury cruise ships in South America.
options.B: The failure of international health authorities to prevent the spread of a deadly virus.
options.C: The challenges and responses surrounding a hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship.
options.D: The personal stories of passengers who were trapped on the MV Hondius.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文從疫情爆發、追蹤乘客、醫療專家的評估、各國政府的撤離計畫，到後續的國際合作與防疫措施，完整涵蓋了此事件的挑戰與應對。選項 A 範圍過窄；選項 B 過於武斷，文章提到國際合作有所改善；選項 D 雖然提到乘客壓力，但並非文章的核心主旨。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
